notes: Seti Astro Suite Pro V1.15.9 Added Luminosity blend type in layers, updated WIMI for pushing annotated image to view, Various bug fixes. V1.15.8 New Tool: Narrowband Integration Tool: Easily combine your RGB image with your continuum subtracted narrowband data now!! Other updates include major optimizations to comet stacking, L recombination (perfect for those pesky stars only images), and a bunch of under the hood updates. V1.15.7 Updates include: Planetary Stacker, Hyperbolic Stretch, ABE presets, recursion fixes, install hardware fixes, aberration gpu support in linux, macos graxpert path updates, and additional bug fixes. V1.15.6 Install HW acceleration bug fixes, Aberration Remover linux onnx bug fixes, stacking suite open folder location update, GHS symmetry point bug fix, planetary stacker drizzling and debayering updates. V1.15.5 No longer required to have python312. You can use Python 312, 313, or 314. If you already have it running with Python 312 I do not recommend upgrading python, if it ain't broke don't fix it. Major updates under the hood in support of this. Other fix: Planetary Stacking now uses full drizzle transforms and advanced guassian kernels also includes centering object option. V1.15.4 Homebrew support for macOS: brew tap setiastro/setiastrosuitepro then brew install --cask saspro --force or brew install saspro. Many thanks to BinaryAstro_Tim for helping getting homebrew working! Hyperbolic Stretch now supports multiple different classes of stretch with a dropdown. Whats In My Image Updates. V1.15.3 Tip of the Day in SASpro. Stacking Suite update to preserve files loaded in dark, flat, lights, and image integration when you change the stacking directory. Add Stars Bug Fix. Other bug fixes. V1.15.2 PDF Support to open pdfs in SASpro. Updates to Dither Analysis for WCS RA and DEC, the ability to select files from the list of on the scatter plots, and context options for them. Icon Cheat Sheet under Shortcuts menu. Welcome screen updates and can be viewed anytime under About menu. Display menu created. V1.15.1 Stacking Execution Monitor for Stacking Suite. Additional analyses in Dither Analyzer V1.15.0 New Tool: Dither Analysis under Star Stuff. Load and analyze your raw images to verify your acquisition is dithering properly and what you are expecting. Can run Dither Analysis after Stacking now as well. Updated SyQon Starless in prep of AxiomV2.1. Other tools updated: Blink, Continuum Subtraction, Star Alignment, Stacking Suite, and Satellite Removal.
